name: @visuelconcept/wui-para
description: PARA — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page: master-detail datapoint parametrization (lazy type/DP/element tree + live value & config-attribute editor; create/rename/delete DPs and types). Requires the PARA REST route to mutate.

routes: /api/para/* (datapoint/type engineering — ParaRoute; required for any mutation, no offline fallback)
